options.content:
- Use Cases: This dashboard can be used to track community growth by OSS maintainers.
- Data Source Required: GitHub users' organizations are used to filter issues/PRs created by certain users. [Publicize users' org](https://docs.github.com/en/account-and-profile/setting-up-and-managing-your-personal-account-on-github/managing-your-membership-in-organizations/publicizing-or-hiding-organization-membership) so that Apache DevLake can collect users' org.
- This dashboard **DOES NOT** honor the time filter on the top-right corner.

panels.title: Dashboard Introduction
Community Issues

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT i.id) FROM issues AS i JOIN board_issues AS bi ON i.id = bi.issue_id JOIN boards AS b ON bi.board_id = b.id WHERE ('${issue_type:csv}' = '' OR i.type::text = ANY(ARRAY[${issue_type:singlequote}]::text[])) AND CAST(i.created_date AS DATE) BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day' AND CURRENT_DATE - (EXTRACT(ISODOW FROM CURRENT_DATE) - 1) * INTERVAL '1 day' AND ('${repo_id:csv}' = '' OR b.id::text = ANY(ARRAY[${repo_id:singlequote}]::text[]))

panels.title: New Issue Count [Previous Week]

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT i.id) FROM issues AS i JOIN board_issues AS bi ON i.id = bi.issue_id JOIN boards AS b ON bi.board_id = b.id WHERE ('${issue_type:csv}' = '' OR i.type::text = ANY(ARRAY[${issue_type:singlequote}]::text[])) AND CAST(i.created_date AS DATE) BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day' AND CURRENT_DATE - (EXTRACT(ISODOW FROM CURRENT_DATE) - 1) * INTERVAL '1 day' AND ('${repo_id:csv}' = '' OR b.id::text = ANY(ARRAY[${repo_id:singlequote}]::text[])) AND NOT i.creator_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT id FROM accounts WHERE ('${org:csv}' = '' OR organization::text = ANY(ARRAY[${org:singlequote}]::text[])))

panels.title: New Issue Created by Community [Previous Week]

targets.rawSql: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN NOT i.creator_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT id FROM accounts WHERE ('${org:csv}' = '' OR organization::text = ANY(ARRAY[${org:singlequote}]::text[]))) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS NUMERIC) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT i.id), 0) AS community_issue_ratio FROM issues AS i JOIN board_issues AS bi ON i.id = bi.issue_id JOIN boards AS b ON bi.board_id = b.id WHERE ('${issue_type:csv}' = '' OR i.type::text = ANY(ARRAY[${issue_type:singlequote}]::text[])) AND CAST(i.created_date AS DATE) BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day' AND CURRENT_DATE - (EXTRACT(ISODOW FROM CURRENT_DATE) - 1) * INTERVAL '1 day' AND ('${repo_id:csv}' = '' OR b.id::text = ANY(ARRAY[${repo_id:singlequote}]::text[]))

panels.title: Ratio of New Issue Created by the Community [Previous Week]

targets.rawSql: SELECT DISTINCT i.creator_name FROM issues AS i JOIN board_issues AS bi ON i.id = bi.issue_id JOIN boards AS b ON bi.board_id = b.id WHERE ('${issue_type:csv}' = '' OR i.type::text = ANY(ARRAY[${issue_type:singlequote}]::text[])) AND CAST(i.created_date AS DATE) BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day' AND CURRENT_DATE - (EXTRACT(ISODOW FROM CURRENT_DATE) - 1) * INTERVAL '1 day' AND ('${repo_id:csv}' = '' OR b.id::text = ANY(ARRAY[${repo_id:singlequote}]::text[])) AND NOT i.creator_name IN (SELECT DISTINCT creator_name FROM issues WHERE created_date < CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day' AND NOT creator_name IS NULL)

panels.title: 1st Time Issue Reporter [Previous Week]

targets.rawSql: WITH issue_comment_list AS (SELECT i.id AS issue_id, i.url, i.title, ic.id AS comment_id, ic.created_date AS comment_date, ic.body, CASE WHEN NOT ic.id IS NULL THEN RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY i.id ORDER BY ic.created_date ASC NULLS FIRST) ELSE NULL END AS comment_rank FROM issues AS i JOIN board_issues AS bi ON i.id = bi.issue_id JOIN boards AS b ON bi.board_id = b.id LEFT JOIN issue_comments AS ic ON i.id = ic.issue_id WHERE ('${issue_type:csv}' = '' OR i.type::text = ANY(ARRAY[${issue_type:singlequote}]::text[])) AND CAST(i.created_date AS DATE) BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day' AND CURRENT_DATE - (EXTRACT(ISODOW FROM CURRENT_DATE) - 1) * INTERVAL '1 day' AND ('${repo_id:csv}' = '' OR b.id::text = ANY(ARRAY[${repo_id:singlequote}]::text[])) AND NOT i.creator_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT id FROM accounts WHERE ('${org:csv}' = '' OR organization::text = ANY(ARRAY[${org:singlequote}]::text[])))) SELECT 1 - CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN comment_id IS NULL THEN issue_id ELSE NULL END) AS NUMERIC) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT issue_id), 0) AS response_rate FROM issue_comment_list

panels.title: Community Issues' Response Rate [Previous Week]

targets.rawSql: WITH issue_comment_list AS (SELECT i.id AS issue_id, i.url, i.issue_key, i.title, i.creator_name, i.created_date AS issue_created_date, i.status, ic.id AS comment_id, ic.created_date AS comment_date, ic.body, CASE WHEN NOT ic.id IS NULL THEN RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY i.id ORDER BY ic.created_date ASC NULLS FIRST) ELSE NULL END AS comment_rank FROM issues AS i JOIN board_issues AS bi ON i.id = bi.issue_id JOIN boards AS b ON bi.board_id = b.id LEFT JOIN issue_comments AS ic ON i.id = ic.issue_id WHERE ('${issue_type:csv}' = '' OR i.type::text = ANY(ARRAY[${issue_type:singlequote}]::text[])) AND CAST(i.created_date AS DATE) BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day' AND CURRENT_DATE - (EXTRACT(ISODOW FROM CURRENT_DATE) - 1) * INTERVAL '1 day' AND ('${repo_id:csv}' = '' OR b.id::text = ANY(ARRAY[${repo_id:singlequote}]::text[])) AND NOT i.creator_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT id FROM accounts WHERE ('${org:csv}' = '' OR organization::text = ANY(ARRAY[${org:singlequote}]::text[])))) SELECT issue_key, title, creator_name, issue_created_date, status, CAST(((EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - issue_created_date))/60)) AS NUMERIC) / NULLIF(1440, 0) AS "queue_time_in_days", url FROM issue_comment_list WHERE comment_id IS NULL

panels.title: List of New Community Issues with no Comments [Previous Week]

targets.rawSql: WITH issue_comment_list AS (SELECT i.id AS issue_id, i.url, i.title, i.created_date AS issue_created_date, ic.id AS comment_id, ic.created_date AS comment_date, ic.body, CASE WHEN NOT ic.id IS NULL THEN RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY i.id ORDER BY ic.created_date ASC NULLS FIRST) ELSE NULL END AS comment_rank FROM issues AS i JOIN board_issues AS bi ON i.id = bi.issue_id JOIN boards AS b ON bi.board_id = b.id LEFT JOIN issue_comments AS ic ON i.id = ic.issue_id WHERE ('${issue_type:csv}' = '' OR i.type::text = ANY(ARRAY[${issue_type:singlequote}]::text[])) AND CAST(i.created_date AS DATE) BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day' AND CURRENT_DATE - (EXTRACT(ISODOW FROM CURRENT_DATE) - 1) * INTERVAL '1 day' AND ('${repo_id:csv}' = '' OR b.id::text = ANY(ARRAY[${repo_id:singlequote}]::text[])) AND NOT i.creator_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT id FROM accounts WHERE ('${org:csv}' = '' OR organization::text = ANY(ARRAY[${org:singlequote}]::text[])))) SELECT AVG(CAST(((EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (comment_date - issue_created_date))/60)) AS NUMERIC) / NULLIF(1440, 0)) FROM issue_comment_list WHERE comment_rank = 1

panels.title: New Community Issues' Average Response Time in Days [Previous Week]

targets.rawSql: WITH issue_comment_list AS (SELECT REVERSE(SPLIT_PART(REVERSE(i.url), '/', 1)) AS issue_number, i.url, i.issue_key, i.title, i.creator_name, i.created_date AS issue_created_date, ic.id AS comment_id, ic.created_date AS comment_date, ic.body, CASE WHEN NOT ic.id IS NULL THEN RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY i.id ORDER BY ic.created_date ASC NULLS FIRST) ELSE NULL END AS comment_rank FROM issues AS i JOIN board_issues AS bi ON i.id = bi.issue_id JOIN boards AS b ON bi.board_id = b.id LEFT JOIN issue_comments AS ic ON i.id = ic.issue_id WHERE ('${issue_type:csv}' = '' OR i.type::text = ANY(ARRAY[${issue_type:singlequote}]::text[])) AND CAST(i.created_date AS DATE) BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day' AND CURRENT_DATE - (EXTRACT(ISODOW FROM CURRENT_DATE) - 1) * INTERVAL '1 day' AND ('${repo_id:csv}' = '' OR b.id::text = ANY(ARRAY[${repo_id:singlequote}]::text[])) AND NOT i.creator_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT id FROM accounts WHERE ('${org:csv}' = '' OR organization::text = ANY(ARRAY[${org:singlequote}]::text[])))) SELECT issue_key, title, creator_name /* body, */, issue_created_date, comment_date, CAST(((EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (comment_date - issue_created_date))/60)) AS NUMERIC) / NULLIF(1440, 0) AS response_time_in_days, url FROM issue_comment_list WHERE comment_rank = 1

panels.title: List of New Community Issues' 1st Comment [Previous Week]
Community PRs

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT pr.id) AS pull_request_count FROM pull_requests AS pr WHERE CAST(created_date AS DATE) BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day' AND CURRENT_DATE - (EXTRACT(ISODOW FROM CURRENT_DATE) - 1) * INTERVAL '1 day' AND ('${repo_id:csv}' = '' OR base_repo_id::text = ANY(ARRAY[${repo_id:singlequote}]::text[]))

panels.title: Number of New Pull Requests [Previous Week]

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT pr.id) AS pull_request_count FROM pull_requests AS pr WHERE CAST(created_date AS DATE) BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day' AND CURRENT_DATE - (EXTRACT(ISODOW FROM CURRENT_DATE) - 1) * INTERVAL '1 day' AND ('${repo_id:csv}' = '' OR base_repo_id::text = ANY(ARRAY[${repo_id:singlequote}]::text[])) AND NOT author_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT id FROM accounts WHERE ('${org:csv}' = '' OR organization::text = ANY(ARRAY[${org:singlequote}]::text[])))

panels.title: Number of New Pull Requests Created by the Community [Previous Week]

targets.rawSql: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN NOT author_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT id FROM accounts WHERE ('${org:csv}' = '' OR organization::text = ANY(ARRAY[${org:singlequote}]::text[]))) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS NUMERIC) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT pr.id), 0) AS community_pr_ratio FROM pull_requests AS pr WHERE CAST(created_date AS DATE) BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day' AND CURRENT_DATE - (EXTRACT(ISODOW FROM CURRENT_DATE) - 1) * INTERVAL '1 day' AND ('${repo_id:csv}' = '' OR base_repo_id::text = ANY(ARRAY[${repo_id:singlequote}]::text[]))

panels.title: Ratio of New PR Created by the Community [Previous Week]

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT pr.id) AS merged_pull_request_count FROM pull_requests AS pr WHERE CAST(created_date AS DATE) BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day' AND CURRENT_DATE - (EXTRACT(ISODOW FROM CURRENT_DATE) - 1) * INTERVAL '1 day' AND ('${repo_id:csv}' = '' OR base_repo_id::text = ANY(ARRAY[${repo_id:singlequote}]::text[])) AND NOT merged_date IS NULL AND NOT author_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT id FROM accounts WHERE ('${org:csv}' = '' OR organization::text = ANY(ARRAY[${org:singlequote}]::text[])))

panels.title: Number of Merged Pull Requests Created by the Community [Previous Week]

targets.rawSql: SELECT AVG(CAST((EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (merged_date - created_date))/60) AS NUMERIC) / NULLIF(1440, 0)) FROM pull_requests WHERE CAST(created_date AS DATE) BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day' AND CURRENT_DATE - (EXTRACT(ISODOW FROM CURRENT_DATE) - 1) * INTERVAL '1 day' AND ('${repo_id:csv}' = '' OR base_repo_id::text = ANY(ARRAY[${repo_id:singlequote}]::text[])) AND NOT merged_date IS NULL AND NOT author_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT id FROM accounts WHERE ('${org:csv}' = '' OR organization::text = ANY(ARRAY[${org:singlequote}]::text[])))

panels.title: Average Time to Merge of Community Pull Requests in Days [Previous Week]

panels.description: Contributors: the PR authors who have merged PR(s)

targets.rawSql: SELECT DISTINCT author_name FROM pull_requests AS pr WHERE CAST(created_date AS DATE) BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day' AND CURRENT_DATE - (EXTRACT(ISODOW FROM CURRENT_DATE) - 1) * INTERVAL '1 day' AND NOT merged_date IS NULL AND ('${repo_id:csv}' = '' OR base_repo_id::text = ANY(ARRAY[${repo_id:singlequote}]::text[])) AND NOT author_name IN (SELECT DISTINCT author_name FROM pull_requests WHERE created_date < CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day' AND NOT author_name IS NULL)

panels.title: First time Contributor [Previous Week]

targets.rawSql: SELECT CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN NOT merged_date IS NULL THEN pr.id ELSE NULL END) AS NUMERIC) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT pr.id), 0) AS merged_pull_request_ratio FROM pull_requests AS pr WHERE CAST(created_date AS DATE) BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day' AND CURRENT_DATE - (EXTRACT(ISODOW FROM CURRENT_DATE) - 1) * INTERVAL '1 day' AND ('${repo_id:csv}' = '' OR base_repo_id::text = ANY(ARRAY[${repo_id:singlequote}]::text[])) AND NOT author_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT id FROM accounts WHERE ('${org:csv}' = '' OR organization::text = ANY(ARRAY[${org:singlequote}]::text[])))

panels.title: Ratio of Merged Pull Requests Created by the Community [Previous Week]

targets.rawSql: SELECT pull_request_key, title, status, author_name, created_date, CAST(((EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (CURRENT_DATE - created_date))/60)) AS NUMERIC) / NULLIF(1440, 0) AS queue_time_in_days, url FROM pull_requests AS pr WHERE CAST(created_date AS DATE) BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day' AND CURRENT_DATE - (EXTRACT(ISODOW FROM CURRENT_DATE) - 1) * INTERVAL '1 day' AND ('${repo_id:csv}' = '' OR base_repo_id::text = ANY(ARRAY[${repo_id:singlequote}]::text[])) AND merged_date IS NULL AND NOT author_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT id FROM accounts WHERE ('${org:csv}' = '' OR organization::text = ANY(ARRAY[${org:singlequote}]::text[])))

panels.title: List of New Community Issues' 1st Comment [Previous Week]

targets.rawSql: SELECT author_name, COUNT(DISTINCT pr.id) AS pull_request_count FROM pull_requests AS pr WHERE CAST(created_date AS DATE) BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day' AND CURRENT_DATE - (EXTRACT(ISODOW FROM CURRENT_DATE) - 1) * INTERVAL '1 day' AND ('${repo_id:csv}' = '' OR base_repo_id::text = ANY(ARRAY[${repo_id:singlequote}]::text[])) AND NOT merged_date IS NULL AND NOT author_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT id FROM accounts WHERE ('${org:csv}' = '' OR organization::text = ANY(ARRAY[${org:singlequote}]::text[]))) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 20

panels.title: Top 20 Community Contributors By Number of PRs Merged [Previous Week]

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT author_id) AS all_contributor_count FROM pull_requests AS pr WHERE ('${repo_id:csv}' = '' OR base_repo_id::text = ANY(ARRAY[${repo_id:singlequote}]::text[])) AND NOT merged_date IS NULL /* and author_id not in (select distinct id from accounts where ('${org:csv}' = '' OR organization::text = ANY(ARRAY[${org:singlequote}]::text[]))) */

panels.title: Top Community Contributors By PRs Created [All History]

targets.rawSql: SELECT author_name, COUNT(DISTINCT pr.id) AS merged_pull_request_count FROM pull_requests AS pr WHERE ('${repo_id:csv}' = '' OR base_repo_id::text = ANY(ARRAY[${repo_id:singlequote}]::text[])) AND NOT merged_date IS NULL /* and author_id not in (select distinct id from accounts where ('${org:csv}' = '' OR organization::text = ANY(ARRAY[${org:singlequote}]::text[]))) */ GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 20

panels.title: Top 20 Community Contributors By Merged PR Numbers [All History]

options.content: This dashboard is created based on this [data schema](https://devlake.apache.org/docs/DataModels/DevLakeDomainLayerSchema). Want to add more metrics? Please follow the [guide](https://devlake.apache.org/docs/Configuration/Dashboards/GrafanaUserGuide).

list.definition: SELECT name || '-' || id AS text FROM repos
list.label: Repo
list.name: repo_id
list.query: SELECT name || '-' || id AS text FROM repos

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT organization FROM accounts WHERE organization <> ''
list.label: Community Definition - Issues and PRs NOT from Organization(s)
list.name: org
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT organization FROM accounts WHERE organization <> ''
